summary: Iteration 63 - Witness Agent Real Audit & Certificate PDF Testing Complete. All backend and frontend tests passed. Witness Agent now builds real Merkle trees from ceremony evidence and writes audit logs to DB. Certificate PDF auto-generated on APPROVED consensus and downloadable.
critical_code_review_comments: Witness Agent correctly builds Merkle tree from ceremony evidence (ceremony_id, document_name, signer_name, verifier evidence_hash, etc.)
Merkle root is a valid SHA256 hash (64 hex characters)
Audit log written to ceremony_audit_logs collection with ceremony_id, merkle_root, timeline_entries, evidence_package_hash
Certificate PDF generated using ReportLab with document info, agent verdicts table, consensus oracle, blockchain seal sections
Certificate endpoint returns valid PDF (Content-Type: application/pdf, starts with %PDF)
Certificate returns 404 for non-sealed ceremonies (correct behavior)
SSE stream fires certificate_generated event after APPROVED consensus
Frontend Witness card displays: merkle root, timeline entries, evidence items, tamper proof, 'Audit log written' checkmark
Download Certificate button only appears on sealed ceremonies (not on pending/failed)
seed_data_creation: Created test ceremonies with prefix 'TEST_' including: TEST_QuickCheck_Document, TEST_SSE_CertEvent_Document, TEST_PendingNoCert_Document
context_for_next_testing_agent: Witness Agent real audit and Certificate PDF features fully tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/ceremony/{id}/execute (returns witness.details.real_audit=true, audit_log_written=true), GET /api/ceremony/{id}/certificate (returns PDF). SSE endpoint fires certificate_generated event. Frontend shows Witness card with merkle root, timeline entries, evidence items, tamper proof, audit log written badge. Download Certificate button visible only on sealed ceremonies.

verified: audit_log_written=true indicates entry in ceremony_audit_logs collection
Returns HTTP 404 for invalid ceremony ID
certificate_generated event fires in SSE stream after APPROVED consensus
Tamper proof status displayed as VALID
Button NOT visible on pending ceremonies
'Certificate PDF generated' appears in execution log

mocked_apis_list: Verifier Agent (simulated when no images provided)
real_integrations: Witness Agent is now REAL (Merkle tree + audit logs)
Sealer Agent connected to REAL Hedera Mainnet (topic 0.0.10373605)
mocked_apis.note: Verifier Agent uses REAL GPT-5.2 Vision when images provided, simulated when not. Witness Agent is now REAL with Merkle tree and audit logs.
